name: Clawpound Knowledge
description: Knowledge work loop for OpenClaw: brainstorm, plan, review, execute, and compound learnings into durable memory. Inspired by EveryInc/compound-knowledge-plugin.

knowledgeSubdir.description: Subdirectory under memory/ for knowledge files. Default: knowledge

plansDir.description: Directory for plan files relative to workspace. Default: plans

autoSuggestCompound.description: Suggest compounding at session end. Default: true
